description: Multi-window task visibility, atomic task writes, and self-hosted Polygon marketplace defaults.
changelog:
**Polygon 0.8.1 — workflow reliability and project-owned marketplace defaults.**

- feat(marketplace): default template fetching now uses the self-hosted Polygon marketplace instead of the upstream mindfold-ai marketplace, with fallback URL handling retained.
- feat(workflow): task/session ownership is now session-scoped so multiple agent windows can work without stomping each other's active task pointer.
- feat(scripts): JSON writes use an atomic replace path and corrupt reads surface more visible diagnostics instead of silently degrading.
- fix(workflow): workflow phase parsing matches the renamed `## Customizing` heading.
notes: Compatibility manifest for the already-published 0.8.1 package. The 0.8.1 tarball did not include this manifest, so 0.9.0 restores the update-chain metadata without adding file migrations.
